data.title: Calamos' New CPSF ETF Offers Growth With A Safety Net
data.description: Calamos Investments adds new structured protection ETF with downside risk buffer and FLEX options, providing risk-managed exposure to S&P 500.

data.title: All You Need To Know About Cal-Maine (CALM) Rating Upgrade To Strong Buy
data.description: Investors might want to bet on Cal-Maine Foods (NASDAQ: CALM), as it has been recently upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). This rating change essentially reflects an upward trend in earnings estimates -- one of the most powerful forces impacting stock prices.

data.title: Bill Gates Reflects On LSD, Cannabis, Risk-Taking And Influence Of Paul Allen And Jimi Hendrix
data.description: Bill Gates smoked weed to impress girls. At 21, he stopped LSD and, a decade later, became a billionaire. That must have impressed the girls.

data.title: Czech Republic Approves Bitcoin Tax Exemption For Long-Term Holders
data.description: The Czech Republic has officially passed a law exempting Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holdings from capital gains tax if held for more than three years.
